sevenDayForecast.headline: Tropical Low (16U) may develop later Wednesday or Thursday to the northwest of the Kimberley coast.
points: Tropical Low 16U may develop into a tropical low later on Wednesday or during Thursday off the northwest Kimberley coast.
Once formed, 16U may move to the south or southeast towards the Kimberley coast and may cross later Friday or Saturday.

There is a Moderate risk from Friday and Saturday of 16U developing into a tropical cyclone however it is possible the low may move over land before being able to strengthen into a tropical cyclone. Regardless the low could still cause gale force winds and heavy rainfall as it impacts the coast later this week or over the weekend.
Residents of the Kimberley coast are advised to monitor forecasts and updates.
